macros.rationale: Protein: 2.2 g/kg lean mass (bulk/recomp, BF% known). Fat: ~35% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (mediterranean).

recommendations: Plan is usable; continue improving fibre metadata and rotate recipe sources for adherence.

weekly_meal_plan.name: 7-day mediterranean protocol meal plan

meals.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
meals.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

meals.name: Mediterranean Rice Recipe
meals.recipe:
Boil basmati rice for approximately 15-20 minutes
Add rice to bowl
Cut up red onion into strips and add to rice
Drain tuna and add to rice
Cut avocado into small squares and add to rice
Squeeze lemon juice over rice
Add salt and pepper if desired

meals.name: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Tempeh, diced into bite sizes
1 cup Trifecta mixed veg or broccoli
1 avocado, sliced lengthwise, divided into quarters
meals.recipe:
For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...
Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

meals.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

meals.name: Vegan Mediterranean Beyond Breakfast Skillet Recipe
ingredients: 4 Trifecta A La Carte Beyond Beef® patties or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Beef®
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
½ cup sweet potato, small diced
meals.recipe:
Heat a medium cast-iron pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add chickpeas, sweet potato, garlic, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice then crumble in the Beyond Meat®.
Cook for 5 minutes until lightly browned then mix in the coriander, nutritional yeast, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Sauté on medium-high heat for 5 more minutes. Then turn off the heat.
Mix in the olives and fresh herbs then dig in!

meals.name: Vegan Southwest Baked Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat® burgers,
crumbled or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Meat burgers®
¼ cup vegetable stock or water
1 Roma tomato, diced or ½ cup pico de gallo
meals.recipe:
To bake your potato in less time, cut your sweet potatoes in half lengthwise and rub with oil (utilize coconut oil for extra flavor), place sweet potatoes cut side down on a baking sheet lined with foil and roast for 25-30 minutes until tender. Move onto the next steps while your sweet potatoes are baking in the oven.
In a food processor or blender, add the cilantro, vegan yogurt, lime juice, and chili powder. Blend until smooth, then place crema into a separate container and store in the fridge until needed.
To prepare your filling, heat a large saute pan over medium-high heat and add 1 teaspoon oil, then add the garlic and onion. Saute the garlic and onion for 4 minutes until they are fragrant and begin to brown.
Crumble the Beyond Meat or Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat burger patties into the saute pan and cook for 5 minutes, mixing with the onion and garlic
Add the corn, bell pepper, and spices, continuing to cook over medium-high heat for 2 more minutes then finish by adding lime juice and stock or water. Cook for an additional minute then remove from heat.
Build your sweet potato by layering the filling into the baked potato, then topping with sliced green onion, avocado, and the cilantro crema.

meals.name: Triple Chocolate Chip Deep Dish Protein Cookie Recipe
ingredients: Optional toppings: ice cream, additional chocolate peanut butter for drizzling
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine all ingredients except chocolate chips in a bowl
Using an electric mixer, mix well
Gently fold in chocolate chips
Pour batter into an 8 inch oven safe skillet (cast iron skillet works best)
Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until top is golden
Allow to sit 5-10 minutes to finish cooking
Top with ice cream and additional chocolate peanut butter if desired

meals.name: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
meals.recipe:
Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

meals.name: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
meals.recipe:
For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.
Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

meals.name: New-England Style Shrimp Rolls
ingredients: 1 Tsp of Paprika (can use more to top)
meals.recipe:
First, heat the Trifecta shrimp up in the microwave for 2-3 minutes or until warm.
Then spray the potato bun with the butter and toast.
On a cutting board, dice up the celery and cut the green onions.
In a bowl, cut up the shrimp as best as you can into smaller pieces. Then add all the ingredients (except the green onions) and mix together. Include a dash of salt and pepper.
Fill the potato bun with the shrimp mixture. Lightly top with paprika and green onions. Enjoy!

meals.name: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy

meals.name: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
meals.recipe:
Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce

meals.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

meals.name: Homemade Vegetarian Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1/2 cup roasted red pepper, drained from jar
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
4 tablespoons orange juice or apple cider vinegar
meals.recipe:
In a saucepot on medium-high heat, add avocado oil or olive oil, minced garlic, diced onion, celery, and carrot. Stirring occasionally cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until the onions begin to brown.
Once the meat and vegetables have browned, add in the spices and roasted red peppers and cook for 1 minute until aromatic and stir to combine. Stir in the crumbled Trifecta meat patties and cook for 3 minutes or add 16 ounces of beyond meat and cook for 5 minutes.
Continue to cook on medium-high heat and add vegetable stock to release any of the brown bits stuck to the pan, then stir in the diced tomatoes and beans; bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer cook for 10 minutes. Season with orange juice or apple cider vinegar, a pinch of salt or pepper is desired then dig in!

meals.name: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

meals.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
meals.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

meals.name: Low Carb Pancakes With Raspberries Recipe
meals.recipe:
Mix egg whites and almond flour together
Heat coconut oil in skillet
Pour half of batter into skillet and cook until brown around edges then flip
Cook other side until brown
Repeat with remaining batter
Serve with raspberries

meals.name: Vegan Savory Grilled Tofu, Broccoli, and Rice Bowl
ingredients: 1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
meals.recipe:
Evenly slice your tofu into strips (about 2 ounces each), pat dry and season with half of the nutritional yeast and pepper.
Add cooking spray on a non-stick grill pan and warm to medium-high heat. Once ready, add your tofu and grill for 3 minutes on each side until it starts to crisp up and leave grill marks.
Add your rice, drained beans, and broccoli to a large mixing bowl. Season with oil, remaining nutritional yeast, black pepper, and salt.
Portion out your rice mixture onto four plates or meal prep containers and top each with 3 pieces of grilled tofu.
Garnish with herbs and a sprinkle of salt.
Enjoy!

meals.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
meals.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

meals.name: Simple Vegetable Frittata Recipe
meals.recipe:
Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees. Warm 9-inch casserole dish in the oven before cooking.
Warm oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the spinach and turn off the heat.
In a blender, add egg whites and cottage cheese. Pulse on high until the mixture is fully combined.
Remove the casserole dish from the oven. Add veggies to the casserole dish and spread evenly.
Pour egg mixture over the veggies.
Cook for 45 min to 1 hour until the center is cooked through. Let cool for 15 minutes before serving.

meals.name: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
meals.recipe:
Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

meals.name: Ethiopian Lentils Recipe (Misir Wot Recipe with Ayib)
meals.recipe:
For the Misir Wot:
For the Ayib:

meals.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

meals.name: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe
ingredients: Oregano, Italian seasoning, basil, thyme to taste
meals.recipe:
Peel and cut eggplant into slices
Liberally apply salt. Let sit 30 minutes
Soak up liquid with paper towel. Rinse thoroughly
Cut slices into quarters
Place one layer in bottom of 9x13 baking pan
Cover with half can diced tomato and one can tomato sauce
Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or until eggplant is as desired

meals.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

meals.name: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf
ingredients: 2 medium leeks (white and light green parts), diced and rinsed
¾ teaspoon berbere spice Blend, or to taste
2 cups cooked adzuki beans, or one 15-ounce can, drained and rinsed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
4 green onions (white and green parts), thinly sliced
meals.recipe:
Place the leeks in a large saucepan, and sauté over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add water 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time to keep the leeks from sticking to the pan.
Add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Add the berbere spice and cook for 30 seconds. Stir in the wild rice, beans, and orange zest, and season with salt and pepper. Cook until the mixture is heated through.
Garnish with the green onions.

meals.name: Simple & Tasty Pesto Egg Sandwich
ingredients: Slice up some of your fav fruit (optional)
meals.recipe:
Cut bread into thick slices.
Cut into thin slices: prosciutto, radish, and egg.
Spread pesto over bread.
Add prosciutto, radish, then peeled hard-boiled egg slices.
Enjoy with your favorite fruit or salad on the side.

meals.name: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.2 g/kg lean mass (bulk/recomp, BF% known). Fat: ~35% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (mediterranean).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 3 cups fruit and 3 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~29 g/day.

alternatives.selected: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe

alternatives.name: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.
Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.
Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...
Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Simple & Tasty Pesto Egg Sandwich
ingredients: Slice up some of your fav fruit (optional)
alternatives.recipe:
Cut bread into thick slices.
Cut into thin slices: prosciutto, radish, and egg.
Spread pesto over bread.
Add prosciutto, radish, then peeled hard-boiled egg slices.
Enjoy with your favorite fruit or salad on the side.

alternatives.name: Easy Gluten-Free Buckwheat Protein Crepes Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp Coconut Oil in liquid form
alternatives.recipe:
In blender, add almond milk, cottage cheese, sea salt, eggs and egg whites, blend 45 seconds
Add buckwheat flour and blend 10 seconds
Refrigerate mixture for 45 minutes before using
After 45 minutes, add coconut oil and blend immediately
Heat nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add quarter cup batter to pan and swirl to distribute evenly
Cook until bottom is browned and can easily be flipped
Cook other side 20-30 seconds

Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

alternatives.name: Homemade Vegetarian Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1/2 cup roasted red pepper, drained from jar
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
4 tablespoons orange juice or apple cider vinegar
alternatives.recipe:
In a saucepot on medium-high heat, add avocado oil or olive oil, minced garlic, diced onion, celery, and carrot. Stirring occasionally cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until the onions begin to brown.
Once the meat and vegetables have browned, add in the spices and roasted red peppers and cook for 1 minute until aromatic and stir to combine. Stir in the crumbled Trifecta meat patties and cook for 3 minutes or add 16 ounces of beyond meat and cook for 5 minutes.
Continue to cook on medium-high heat and add vegetable stock to release any of the brown bits stuck to the pan, then stir in the diced tomatoes and beans; bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer cook for 10 minutes. Season with orange juice or apple cider vinegar, a pinch of salt or pepper is desired then dig in!

alternatives.selected: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise

alternatives.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
alternatives.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

alternatives.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

alternatives.selected: New-England Style Shrimp Rolls

alternatives.name: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

alternatives.name: Mediterranean Rice Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Boil basmati rice for approximately 15-20 minutes
Add rice to bowl
Cut up red onion into strips and add to rice
Drain tuna and add to rice
Cut avocado into small squares and add to rice
Squeeze lemon juice over rice
Add salt and pepper if desired

alternatives.name: The Perfect Curry Tuna Melt (With Jicama Fries!) Recipe
ingredients: Jicama Fries: 1 cup jicama peeled and cut, 2 tsp oil, Cajun seasoning
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425
Toss together jicama, oil and seasoning
Spread on baking sheet and bake 20 minutes, toss, bake another 20 minutes until golden
While fries bake, mix together tuna, yogurt, curry spice and chives
Divide tuna evenly between 2 slices of bread
Place a slice of cheese on top of each sandwich
Top with additional slice of bread
Place in oven with fries for last 3 minutes until cheese is melted
Divide fries evenly and serve each with one sandwich

alternatives.selected: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe

alternatives.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
alternatives.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

alternatives.name: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

alternatives.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

alternatives.selected: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.recipe:
In a saucepot on medium-high heat, add avocado oil or olive oil, minced garlic, diced onion, celery, and carrot. Stirring occasionally cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until the onions begin to brown.
Once the meat and vegetables have browned, add in the spices and roasted red peppers and cook for 1 minute until aromatic and stir to combine. Stir in the crumbled Trifecta meat patties and cook for 3 minutes or add 16 ounces of beyond meat and cook for 5 minutes.
Continue to cook on medium-high heat and add vegetable stock to release any of the brown bits stuck to the pan, then stir in the diced tomatoes and beans; bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer cook for 10 minutes. Season with orange juice or apple cider vinegar, a pinch of salt or pepper is desired then dig in!

alternatives.selected: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe

alternatives.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

alternatives.name: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

alternatives.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
alternatives.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

alternatives.selected: Homemade Vegetarian Chili Recipe

alternatives.name: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe
ingredients: Oregano, Italian seasoning, basil, thyme to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Peel and cut eggplant into slices
Liberally apply salt. Let sit 30 minutes
Soak up liquid with paper towel. Rinse thoroughly
Cut slices into quarters
Place one layer in bottom of 9x13 baking pan
Cover with half can diced tomato and one can tomato sauce
Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or until eggplant is as desired

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf
ingredients: 2 medium leeks (white and light green parts), diced and rinsed
¾ teaspoon berbere spice Blend, or to taste
2 cups cooked adzuki beans, or one 15-ounce can, drained and rinsed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
4 green onions (white and green parts), thinly sliced
alternatives.recipe:
Place the leeks in a large saucepan, and sauté over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add water 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time to keep the leeks from sticking to the pan.
Add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Add the berbere spice and cook for 30 seconds. Stir in the wild rice, beans, and orange zest, and season with salt and pepper. Cook until the mixture is heated through.
Garnish with the green onions.

alternatives.name: Lentil Beans (Indian style) - aka Dhal Soup Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic and onion for 2 minutes while stirring
Add the spices and stir
Put in tomatoes, red lentils, lemon juice, vegetable stock and coconut milk
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are cooked
Season with salt and pepper
Add cilantro and additional lemon juice to add more flavor

alternatives.selected: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe

alternatives.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
alternatives.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

alternatives.name: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy

alternatives.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

alternatives.selected: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)

alternatives.name: Vegan Southwest Baked Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat® burgers,
crumbled or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Meat burgers®
¼ cup vegetable stock or water
1 Roma tomato, diced or ½ cup pico de gallo
alternatives.recipe:
To bake your potato in less time, cut your sweet potatoes in half lengthwise and rub with oil (utilize coconut oil for extra flavor), place sweet potatoes cut side down on a baking sheet lined with foil and roast for 25-30 minutes until tender. Move onto the next steps while your sweet potatoes are baking in the oven.
In a food processor or blender, add the cilantro, vegan yogurt, lime juice, and chili powder. Blend until smooth, then place crema into a separate container and store in the fridge until needed.
To prepare your filling, heat a large saute pan over medium-high heat and add 1 teaspoon oil, then add the garlic and onion. Saute the garlic and onion for 4 minutes until they are fragrant and begin to brown.
Crumble the Beyond Meat or Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat burger patties into the saute pan and cook for 5 minutes, mixing with the onion and garlic
Add the corn, bell pepper, and spices, continuing to cook over medium-high heat for 2 more minutes then finish by adding lime juice and stock or water. Cook for an additional minute then remove from heat.
Build your sweet potato by layering the filling into the baked potato, then topping with sliced green onion, avocado, and the cilantro crema.

alternatives.selected: Low Carb Pancakes With Raspberries Recipe

alternatives.name: Savory Teff Cakes with Wilted Chard
ingredients: 1 1/2 cups teff ( whole grain, not flour)
1 teaspoon Herbs de Provence or Italian seasoning
1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved or sliced
1/4 cup Italian parsley ( or cilantro or basil) chopped
alternatives.recipe:
Cook the teff. In a medium pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add shallot and saute until fragrant and deeply golden. Add water, teff, salt, spices and whisk until smooth. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover and cook 15 minutes, or until teff is tender (yet still intact) and when stirred has a consistency of a thick porridge.
Grease an 8×8 inch baking dish with olive oil. Give teff a good stir and pour into the baking dish. Using an oiled spatula, smooth the top. Let this cool and place into the fridge until it sets up and is firm, about 4 hours (or overnight). If making ahead see notes.
Once teff is cooled and firm, cut into four squares. Remove cakes, then cut each into two triangles. ( See notes, for appetizer version.)
Pan fry the teff cakes in a skillet, with a little oil, over medium heat, until crispy and heated through, about 5-6 minutes on each side. Place in a warm oven if you like. (Alternately, you can bake these on a greased, parchment-lined sheet pan- 20 mins @400F . Brush the tops with olive oil. )
Wipe out the skillet, heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat and add garlic, stirring until golden, about 2-3 mintues. Add Kale and gently wilt. Add a splash of white wine and season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
Place tomatoes, parsley, olive oil, and balsamic in a small bowl and mix. Season with salt and pepper.
Place the warm, crispy teff cakes ( 2 triangles per person) on a plate, layering with the chard. Divide the tomato relish over the top, spooning any remaining dressing on or around the cakes. Serve immediately!

alternatives.name: Vegan Mediterranean Beyond Breakfast Skillet Recipe
ingredients: 4 Trifecta A La Carte Beyond Beef® patties or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Beef®
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
½ cup sweet potato, small diced
alternatives.recipe:
Heat a medium cast-iron pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add chickpeas, sweet potato, garlic, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice then crumble in the Beyond Meat®.
Cook for 5 minutes until lightly browned then mix in the coriander, nutritional yeast, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Sauté on medium-high heat for 5 more minutes. Then turn off the heat.
Mix in the olives and fresh herbs then dig in!

alternatives.name: Easy Gluten-Free Buckwheat Protein Crepes Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp Coconut Oil in liquid form
alternatives.recipe:
In blender, add almond milk, cottage cheese, sea salt, eggs and egg whites, blend 45 seconds
Add buckwheat flour and blend 10 seconds
Refrigerate mixture for 45 minutes before using
After 45 minutes, add coconut oil and blend immediately
Heat nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add quarter cup batter to pan and swirl to distribute evenly
Cook until bottom is browned and can easily be flipped
Cook other side 20-30 seconds

alternatives.selected: Vegan Savory Grilled Tofu, Broccoli, and Rice Bowl

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf
ingredients: 2 medium leeks (white and light green parts), diced and rinsed
¾ teaspoon berbere spice Blend, or to taste
2 cups cooked adzuki beans, or one 15-ounce can, drained and rinsed

Garnish with the green onions.

Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat

alternatives.selected: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad

alternatives.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

alternatives.name: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop Muscle Gauge Nutrition Cinnamon Whey Isolate
alternatives.recipe: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

alternatives.name: No-Bake Gluten-Free High Protein Energy Bites Recipe
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
alternatives.recipe:
In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt
Add in almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla and optional mix-ins, mix until just combined
Scoop 1 tbsp of mixture and roll between hands into ball
Place on cookie sheet and repeat until all mixture is used (makes about 20-28)
Place cookie sheet in refrigerator for about 30 minutes to set
Store in airtight container in refrigerator for up to 1 week

alternatives.selected: Simple Vegetable Frittata Recipe

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Lentils Recipe (Misir Wot Recipe with Ayib)
alternatives.recipe:
For the Misir Wot:
For the Ayib:

alternatives.recipe:

Top with sugar free syrup if desired

alternatives.name: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
alternatives.recipe:
For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.
Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

alternatives.selected: Ethiopian Lentils Recipe (Misir Wot Recipe with Ayib)

alternatives.name: Lentil Beans (Indian style) - aka Dhal Soup Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic and onion for 2 minutes while stirring
Add the spices and stir
Put in tomatoes, red lentils, lemon juice, vegetable stock and coconut milk
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are cooked
Season with salt and pepper
Add cilantro and additional lemon juice to add more flavor

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf
ingredients: 2 medium leeks (white and light green parts), diced and rinsed
¾ teaspoon berbere spice Blend, or to taste
2 cups cooked adzuki beans, or one 15-ounce can, drained and rinsed

4 green onions (white and green parts), thinly sliced
alternatives.recipe:

Add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Add the berbere spice and cook for 30 seconds. Stir in the wild rice, beans, and orange zest, and season with salt and pepper. Cook until the mixture is heated through.
Garnish with the green onions.

alternatives.name: Vegan Savory Grilled Tofu, Broccoli, and Rice Bowl
ingredients: 1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
alternatives.recipe:
Evenly slice your tofu into strips (about 2 ounces each), pat dry and season with half of the nutritional yeast and pepper.
Add cooking spray on a non-stick grill pan and warm to medium-high heat. Once ready, add your tofu and grill for 3 minutes on each side until it starts to crisp up and leave grill marks.
Add your rice, drained beans, and broccoli to a large mixing bowl. Season with oil, remaining nutritional yeast, black pepper, and salt.
Portion out your rice mixture onto four plates or meal prep containers and top each with 3 pieces of grilled tofu.
Garnish with herbs and a sprinkle of salt.
Enjoy!

alternatives.selected: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe

alternatives.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
alternatives.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated

alternatives.name: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop Muscle Gauge Nutrition Cinnamon Whey Isolate
alternatives.recipe: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

alternatives.name: High Protein Strawberry Shortcake Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Spray 4 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder and baking soda
Add in egg whites and sweetener if using
Allow batter to sit for 5 minutes
Evenly divide batter between 4 muffin cups
Bake for about 7 minutes
While shortcakes are baking, dice strawberries
When shortcakes are done, allow to cool 5 minutes
Using a knife, cut the top off the muffin and scoop out a bit of the middle to create a cup shape
Fill cake with Greek yogurt and top with strawberries and whipped cream if desired

alternatives.selected: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe

alternatives.name: Low-Carb Portobello Mushroom Bruschetta
alternatives.recipe:
First, heat up a skillet or a grill. Then spray the Mushrooms with non stick spray. Grill for 2-3 minutes on each side. Remove from heat but keep the stove/ grill on.
In a bowl, mix the tomatoes, garlic, balsamic vinegar, and basil together. Add the mix to the inside of the mushrooms.
Top the mushrooms with cheese and place back on the skillet/grill.
Cover and heat for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Enjoy!

alternatives.selected: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe

alternatives.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
alternatives.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

alternatives.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.name: High Protein Breakfast Banana Split Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Evenly divide greek yogurt into 3 separate bowls
Mix chocolate protein powder with yogurt in one bowl
Mix strawberry protein powder with yogurt in second bowl
Mix vanilla protein powder with yogurt in third bowl
Place each bowl in freezer for 20 minutes
Slice banana in half lengthwise
Remove yogurt from freezer and give each bowl a good mix
Assemble each flavor of yogurt on top of the banana
Finish off with strawberries, pineapple, whipped topping, walnuts, chocolate sauce and cherry

alternatives.selected: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf

alternatives.name: Lentil Beans (Indian style) - aka Dhal Soup Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic and onion for 2 minutes while stirring
Add the spices and stir
Put in tomatoes, red lentils, lemon juice, vegetable stock and coconut milk
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are cooked
Season with salt and pepper
Add cilantro and additional lemon juice to add more flavor

alternatives.name: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe
ingredients: Oregano, Italian seasoning, basil, thyme to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Peel and cut eggplant into slices
Liberally apply salt. Let sit 30 minutes
Soak up liquid with paper towel. Rinse thoroughly
Cut slices into quarters
Place one layer in bottom of 9x13 baking pan
Cover with half can diced tomato and one can tomato sauce
Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or until eggplant is as desired

alternatives.name: Vegan Savory Grilled Tofu, Broccoli, and Rice Bowl
ingredients: 1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
alternatives.recipe:
Evenly slice your tofu into strips (about 2 ounces each), pat dry and season with half of the nutritional yeast and pepper.
Add cooking spray on a non-stick grill pan and warm to medium-high heat. Once ready, add your tofu and grill for 3 minutes on each side until it starts to crisp up and leave grill marks.
Add your rice, drained beans, and broccoli to a large mixing bowl. Season with oil, remaining nutritional yeast, black pepper, and salt.
Portion out your rice mixture onto four plates or meal prep containers and top each with 3 pieces of grilled tofu.
Garnish with herbs and a sprinkle of salt.
Enjoy!

alternatives.selected: Simple & Tasty Pesto Egg Sandwich

alternatives.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
alternatives.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

alternatives.name: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy

alternatives.name: Grilled Tilapia Tacos With Pico De Gallo Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Chop tomatoes and toss in a bowl with minced jalapeno, cilantro and onion. Add juice of one lime and salt. This is your pico de gallo - refrigerate
Combine juice of one lime, salt, pepper and olive oil in a bowl and whisk. Marinade tilapia 15-20 minutes maximum
Mix reduced fat sour cream, cilantro and juice of another lime for cream sauce - refrigerate
Grill tilapia until cooked through
Allow tilapia to cool then slice
Place in tortilla, add sour cream mixture, top with pico de gallo
Add hot sauce if desired

alternatives.selected: Ethiopian Alicha Wot

alternatives.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Vegan Southwest Baked Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat® burgers,
crumbled or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Meat burgers®
¼ cup vegetable stock or water
1 Roma tomato, diced or ½ cup pico de gallo
alternatives.recipe:
To bake your potato in less time, cut your sweet potatoes in half lengthwise and rub with oil (utilize coconut oil for extra flavor), place sweet potatoes cut side down on a baking sheet lined with foil and roast for 25-30 minutes until tender. Move onto the next steps while your sweet potatoes are baking in the oven.
In a food processor or blender, add the cilantro, vegan yogurt, lime juice, and chili powder. Blend until smooth, then place crema into a separate container and store in the fridge until needed.
To prepare your filling, heat a large saute pan over medium-high heat and add 1 teaspoon oil, then add the garlic and onion. Saute the garlic and onion for 4 minutes until they are fragrant and begin to brown.
Crumble the Beyond Meat or Trifecta A la Carte Beyond Meat burger patties into the saute pan and cook for 5 minutes, mixing with the onion and garlic
Add the corn, bell pepper, and spices, continuing to cook over medium-high heat for 2 more minutes then finish by adding lime juice and stock or water. Cook for an additional minute then remove from heat.
Build your sweet potato by layering the filling into the baked potato, then topping with sliced green onion, avocado, and the cilantro crema.
